## Formalization for Resource

| Property | Constraint |
|----------|------------|
| [capacityInUse](https://w3id.org/citydata/part1/v1/capacityInUse) | exactly 1 |
| [hasAllocation](https://w3id.org/citydata/part1/v1/hasAllocation) | only [PlannedAllocation](PlannedAllocation.md) |
| [hasAvailableCapacity](https://w3id.org/citydata/part1/v1/hasAvailableCapacity) | exactly 1 |
| [hasCapacity](https://w3id.org/citydata/part1/v1/hasCapacity) | exactly 1 |
| [hasLocation](https://w3id.org/citydata/part1/v1/hasLocation) | only [Location](Location.md) |
| [participatesIn](https://w3id.org/citydata/part1/v1/participatesIn) | min 1 |
| subClassOf | [ResourceThing](ResourceThing.md) |
